title: L-Man's Cat Clocks
description: This mod adds 20 brand new cat clocks into Minecraft, including all vanilla variants and some new ones!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459d06d80401d496e5bfbea4ebd7e17e58b10755.png)

# **This mod aims to make minecraft clocks more fun and cute by adding 20 new cat themed clocks to the game.** 
# 
these clocks are based on the old '_Kit-Cat Klocks_', and come in each vanilla cat varient as well as some new familar cats.

**_Vanilla_**
1. Black and white
2. Black
3. British
4. Calico
5. Jellie
6. Ocelot
7. Persian
8. Ragdoll
9. Red
10. Siamese
11. Tabby
12. White

**_Originals_**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

13. Old School
14. Garfield
15. Nyan
16. Tom
17. Hello
18. Cheshire
19. Gumball
20. Meowth


</details>


**ALL CLOCKS ARE CRAFTED IN STONE CUTTER WITH A CLOCK.
These clocks are purely for decoration**
